title: CLOTO SYSTEM
subtitle: First-time setup
python_missing_description: Python 3.10 or later is required to run MCP servers.
python_install_windows: Install Python from python.org or run: winget install Python.Python.3
python_install_macos: Install Python via Homebrew: brew install python3
python_install_linux: Install Python via your package manager: sudo apt install python3 python3-venv
start_description: MCP servers need to be downloaded and configured. This is a one-time process.
error_description: An error occurred during setup. You can retry the process.
complete_description: All MCP servers have been installed and configured.
